/usr/bin/ar qc libMachO2bfuscator_lib.a CMakeFiles/MachO2bfuscator_lib.dir/src/mach_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MachO2bfuscator_lib.dir/src/objc_types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MachO2bfuscator_lib.dir/src/objc_extractor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MachO2bfuscator_lib.dir/src/symbol_sets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MachO2bfuscator_lib.dir/src/binary_patcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MachO2bfuscator_lib.dir/src/obfuscator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MachO2bfuscator_lib.dir/src/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MachO2bfuscator_lib.dir/src/cli/cli_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MachO2bfuscator_lib.dir/src/mangler/caesar_mangler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MachO2bfuscator_lib.dir/src/mangler/random_mangler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MachO2bfuscator_lib.dir/src/mangler/real_word_mangler.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libMachO2bfuscator_lib.a
